category: impulsive life changes (hair, moving cities, quitting, rebrands)
hook_text: she's getting a fringe. it's decided
punchline: you're not getting a fringe. you're getting a whole new personality for free

category: girl math — a purchase being justified
hook_text: i spent $280 on a coat but i wear it every day
punchline: this coat has a lower daily cost than your water usage. it's infrastructure 🧥

category: how hard can it be — a skill, job, or project she's deciding she can obviously do
punchline: mediocre men open bakeries every day. you're basically overqualified

hook_text: do i text him or wait
punchline: which is valid. chaos is how we collect information 🔬

hook_text: it's midnight and i'm rearranging my entire room
punchline: you'll wake up in a completely different life tomorrow. that's called a glow up 🛏️
mum's concern is temporary. your main character moment is forever

category: girl math — a purchase being justified
hook_text: she did the maths. it's basically free
punchline: it's 0.003 cents a cookie. you're feeding your future family for free

category: how hard can it be — a skill, job, or project she's deciding she can obviously do
hook_text: i want to start a podcast but i have no equipment
punchline: you're not starting a podcast. you're finally going public 🎙️

category: impulsive life changes (hair, moving cities, quitting, rebrands)
punchline: you didn't quit a job. you cleared your schedule for your actual life

hook_text: the group chat is on fire
punchline: send a voice note. nothing says 'i care' like 3 minutes of rambling 🎤

hook_text: he watched my story but didn't reply to my text
punchline: you're not waiting anymore. you're just doing research with a really cute subject 🔬

hook_text: bestie got this DM at noon
punchline: the ball is in his court. you're just vibing courtside looking incredible

hook_text: she's starting a sourdough starter at 11pm
punchline: name her. she needs a name before she can rise 🍞

category: girl math — a purchase being justified
hook_text: i bought two of the same top in different colours
punchline: you didn't buy two tops. you diversified your portfolio 📊
smile, eat the pasta, and know you're thriving on a timeline she can't see yet
